description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the openjdk:8-jdk Docker image. Define variables ANDROID_BUILD_TOOLS=25.0.2, ANDROID_COMPILE_SDK=26, ANDROID_SDK_TOOLS=27.0.1 and a before_script that updates apt, installs wget tar unzip lib32stdc++6 lib32z1, downloads and unzips the Android SDK, adds license files, runs sdkmanager to update and install platforms android-${ANDROID_COMPILE_SDK} and build-tools ${ANDROID_BUILD_TOOLS}, sets ANDROID_HOME and updates PATH, and makes gradlew executable. Add a build stage with a build job that runs ./gradlew assembleDebug and stores the app/build/outputs/ directory as an artifact. Add a test stage with a unitTests job that runs ./gradlew test. Cache the .m2/ and .gradle/ directories between jobs.
